creator: mickey@netassembly.de
text:
Apparently there has been a pkg-plist file in both directories, so diff dit not 
include it. I have no idea how it got there. Anyway, I removed the pkg-plist 
files in both directories and added PLIST_FILES back to the Makefile and redid 
the diff. Attached is the new diff of the vserver.bak directory against the new 
vserver directory.

Thanks.
